title: Funny Combat Items
description: Adds very fun items to use when fighting a friend. (totally skill based and not broken) That's a lie. The Amethyst Staff is broken. If your opponent has it, RUN. Have fun.
body:
The mod adds 4 items.
# The Amethyst Staff 🔮
A Staff that throws amethyst crystals that deals progressively more damage. The maximum damage is 11.5. It can be enchanted. The enchantment removes the damage cap.


![Amethyst Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be6bc44c5c9126670520d398728e01e7c42d35b.png)

# The Pitcher Plant Soup 👃
If you eat it you can go and SMELL entities. (To smell an entity just right click them while shifting). If you SMELL an entity a big nose appears on top of them and SMELL them really hard. So hard, you start to go UP. (like 60 blocks). And then, they start falling with slow falling XD.


![Pitcher Plant Soup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc1a688e290ecf1e653f23b9d994f27f2590278a.png)

# The Flash Bomb ✨🎇
You can throw it. It does what a flash bomb does. It has nice looking particles with bloom!


![Flash Bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97efd5148486179f1d06664bd3cb713b70bb9365.png)

# The Echo Horn 🎺
Right-click any player to randomize their movement keys for 30 seconds and shake their camera side-to-side. It’s a lot of fun. (at least for the person doing it!)

![Echo Horn Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54d85af456eb66f26a0aecd4580b91c6d136effc.png)


I am planning to add more items soon!
